summary: Full e2e testing of ReportBridge MVP. All 20 backend tests pass. Frontend flows tested: landing page, login with demo credentials, dashboard with demo reports, clients management (add client), new report creation with CSV upload, templates page, report preview with KPI cards/charts/table/export, logout. All core features working.

minor.issue: Industry field not saved when submitted via Add Client modal in UI (shows '–' in list). Backend API itself saves industry correctly in pytest - may be a frontend form issue where industry input value isn't sent.

integration_issues.issue: Industry field shows '–' after creating client via UI modal, even though 'Agency' was entered. The input field may be using a different component (select/dropdown) than a simple text input, so the fill() command may not work correctly. Needs manual verification.

issues: KPI label text 'TOTAL SPEND' and 'TOTAL LEADS' use uppercase small labels - good contrast, readable

action_items: Investigate industry field not being saved in Add Client modal (could be a select/dropdown vs text input mismatch in the form component)
critical_code_review_comments: seed_demo only runs once (when demo user doesn't exist) - idempotent - good
httpOnly cookies set correctly for JWT auth
No brute force lockout implemented (playbook mentions checking this) - not critical for MVP
CORS origins from env var - good pattern
seed_data_creation: Demo data already seeded: Acme Digital, Bloom Retail clients + 2 complete reports for demo@reportbridge.io. Test created 'Test Agency' client and 'Test Q1 Report' draft during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows verified: auth (login/logout/register), clients CRUD, report creation wizard (3 steps: create->upload CSV->map columns), report preview with KPI cards (TOTAL SPEND, TOTAL LEADS, TOTAL REVENUE, COST PER LEAD, ROAS), 2 Recharts charts (line + bar), data table, executive summary with edit, Export PDF button. Templates page shows empty state with CTA. 3-panel layout (left sidebar, center content, right inspector) works correctly.
